case_title: JOSE ALFREDO ROSAS ESCARTIN VS. GABRIEL SERRATO

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SERRATO, GABRIEL HEARING SET FOR MAR-19-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESCARTIN, JOSE ALFREDO ROSAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERRATO, GABRIEL $1,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,850.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,700.00 FILED BY ESCARTIN, JOSE ALFREDO ROSAS AS TO DEFENDANT SERRATO, GABRIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GABRIEL SERRATO IS GRANTED. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESCARTIN, JOSE ALFREDO ROSAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SERRATO, GABRIEL PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) SERVED DEC-19-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SERRATO, GABRIEL
